experiments.title: Project Fluid Motion
experiments.objective: Improve educator animation quality via better movement (ease, anticipation, pose blend), not more motion.
experiments.method: Implement fluid_motion.py easing/pose blend; wire through performer; render 20–30s Cells benchmark with existing bio demo alias fluid_cells.
experiments.outcome: Benchmark exported successfully; QC purposeful_gestures true; motion engine fluid_motion accepted into educator path.
lessons: Stillness with life beats fidget spam.

experiments.title: Sprint 6h30 continuous improvement
experiments.objective: Cycle educator Shorts with Echoer handoffs, AELS review, and pause_boost so engagement improves cycle-over-cycle.
experiments.method: Each cycle: ECP task → TTS → Fluid Motion render → Educational + AELS + Quality gates → GCIS review → apply pause_boost → next.
experiments.outcome: Operational educator path; Cycle 3 measured hook and engagement gains; quality overall ~75 plateau. Report cycle-count drift noted (some docs 3 vs 5).
lessons: ECP + AELS each cycle is required infrastructure.
Hook ≥72 before ship when AELS reviews.
Analytics loop still blocked without YouTube OAuth.

experiments.title: PROJECT FOUNDATION — Perfect the Teacher
experiments.objective: Simplify pipeline to white studio + whiteboard + Gen; perfect fundamentals before scenery.
experiments.method: foundation_studio + whiteboard stroke-reveal; attire none; Newton Second Law trilogy scripts; unique export.
experiments.outcome: Physics_001–003 shipped; teaching clarity prioritized; MacroCenter/environments deferred.
lessons: White studio focuses attention on the lesson.
Welcome back / In the next lesson framing is franchise-safe.

experiments.title: Executive Sprint 001 — Foundation Quality Lock
experiments.objective: Raise Foundation educator quality floor and fail-closed ship gate; wire AELS beats into production script.
experiments.method: foundation_gate.py; lipsync floor 70; whiteboard timing sync; AELS-upgraded F=ma beats; ES001 then ES001b re-render after revision.
experiments.outcome: Quality ~75 → 79.3; gate passed; weak coordination (AELS not in script) rejected until revision. Canonical: Physics_001_F_Equals_MA_ES001b.mp4.
lessons: Advisory gates are insufficient — fail-closed on ship path.
AELS JSON must sync into the production script before ACCEPT.

experiments.title: Stick figure science experiments (batch of 3)
experiments.objective: Produce three stick-science Shorts (Mentos, elephant toothpaste, oobleck) via asset pipeline with Dash.
experiments.method: Orchestrator / asset production path; CHAR-DASH; batch render to stick test export directory.
experiments.outcome: 3/3 READY_TO_POST with QC score 100 each; ~55–60s durations. Parallel to educator Fluid Motion path — different production mode.
lessons: Asset/Ken Burns path remains separate from educator_mode performer path.
Batch QC can pass while franchise teaching standards still need Method + Foundation for Academy Shorts.

experiments.title: Agent 26 — Gen lab coat gate
experiments.objective: Stop implied lab coat on professor=True; lock Gen Foundation attire to clean stick.
experiments.method: coat=False / attire=none defaults; validation rejects lab_coat for CHAR-PROFESSOR-001; regenerate turnarounds; Character Bible update.
experiments.outcome: Coat opt-in only; Foundation consistency pass; tests green including coat-off pixel check.
lessons: Identity locks need code + bible + tests.
MacroCenter coat requires explicit version bump later.
